candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: This is the explicit D&A component under the selected parent row 'Cost of Goods Sold'. Because the selected COGS final_choice is the total COGS row, this D&A appears embedded within that selected bucket rather than sitting outside it, so it should not be added separately.

variables.notes: Selected COGS bucket is the total row 'Cost of Goods Sold'. 'Depreciation & Amortization in Cost of Revenues' plus 'Cost of Goods Sold-other' equals that total, so adding it separately would double count.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: The selected XSGA_COMPONENTS row is 'Selling Expenses - other', not the broader 'Selling Expenses' total. This D&A line appears as the separate depreciation/amortization component that, together with 'Selling Expenses - other', sums to 'Selling Expenses'. Therefore it sits outside the selected bucket and should be added separately.

The selected XSGA_COMPONENTS row is 'Administrative Expenses - other', not the broader 'Administrative expenses' total. This D&A line appears as the separate depreciation/amortization component that, together with 'Administrative Expenses - other', sums to 'Administrative expenses'. Therefore it sits outside the selected bucket and should be added separately.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: This is COGS-related D&A, not SG&A-related, so it is not relevant to XSGA_DA.

final_choice.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses

variables.notes: Earlier XSGA selection intentionally used the '- other' component rows and excluded broader selling/administrative totals. The two explicit D&A rows sit alongside those selected component rows and should be added separately. No R&D row is present, and XRD is empty, so no R&D D&A adjustment is needed.
